items.title: Respond to Barak Perelman on Opti Series A round terms and finalize check size
items.context: FW from Richie on Jun 16: Barak closing ~$16M round at $75-80M pre-money. Mayfield and YL Ventures co-leading. Proposed allocation $4M for Fin Capital. Richie recommends leaning in, rightsizing to ~$2M. 'We indicated to Barak that we would bring the terms back to the group and follow up with next steps.'

items.title: Follow up with Matt Polak on VanishID term sheet status in ~1 week
items.context: Email from matt@vanishid.com on Jun 18: 'We have been going back and forth on some term sheets. I hope to have an update in the next week or so.' Derek acknowledged and asked to stay updated.

items.title: Follow up on co-investment discussion with SMFL re: Unstructured Series C
items.context: Calendar event 'Co-investment Discussion: Unstructured' on Jun 19 with SMFL attendees (Takeshi Fujiwara, Kazuki Kyotani, Yohei Kawana) and Atlas Beyond. Series C discussion with LP co-investors.

items.title: Follow up with PVML (Shachar Schnapp) after intro meeting
items.context: Calendar event 'Teams: Fin Capital <> PVML' on Jun 16 with shachar.schnapp@pvml.com and Derek. New company intro meeting.

items.title: Follow up with Brava Security (Idan) after intro meeting
items.context: Calendar event 'Teams: Fin Capital <> Brava Security' on Jun 16 with idan@brava.security and Derek. New company intro meeting.

items.title: Follow up with Brookfield (Cindy Chen, David Bao) after meeting
items.context: Calendar event '30 Min Meeting between Derek Wu and Cindy Chen' on Jun 17 with cindy.chen@brookfield.com and david.bao@brookfield.com.

items.title: Follow up with Forestrat (Anand & Jacob) after NYC in-person meeting
items.context: Calendar event 'Meet at Fin NYC: Forestrat <> Fin Capital' on Jun 17 with anand@forestrat.ai and jacob@forestrat.ai. In-person meeting at Fin NYC office.

items.title: Follow up with Qeso.ai (Eyal Gurevich) after follow-up meeting
items.context: Calendar event 'Fin Capital / Qeso.ai - Follow-up' on Jun 18 with eyal@qeso.ai, eddy@qeso.ai, and dani@qeso.ai. Second meeting with the company.
